app.tagline: Your private research assistant · Verifiable insights from public data
app.watchlistEmpty: No symbols yet. Enter a ticker and tap “+ Add current”.
app.historyLocked: Free tier: latest report only. Upgrade to Pro {{pro}} for full history.
app.loadingHint: Web search and drafting may take up to a minute.
app.errSessionStale: Session expired. Please sign in again (required after a server redeploy).
app.errGeneric: Something went wrong, please try again
app.historyLockedItem: Full history is a Pro feature — upgrade to unlock
app.watchlistFull: Watchlist full ({{cap}} symbols). Upgrade to Pro for 50, or Pro+ for 200.
app.upgradeProPlus: Pro+ · {{price}} · deeper analysis + 200 watchlist + critic review
app.disclaimer: This tool summarizes public information and scenarios for reference only. Not investment advice. You are responsible for your own decisions.

auth.loginSub: Sign in to your Wenap account
auth.registerSub: 5 free analyses per month, no credit card
auth.loginInstead: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.verifySentTo: We sent a verification link to {{email}}
auth.verifyCheckInbox: Please check your inbox and click the link to verify.
auth.verifyTtl: Link valid for 24 hours. Check spam if needed.
auth.verifyExpired: This link has expired. Resend a verification email below.
auth.verifyInvalid: Invalid or already used link. Resend verification email below.
auth.verifyResendFail: Could not send email. Try again later.
auth.emailNotConfigured: Email service is not configured (set RESEND_API_KEY on the server).
auth.emailSendFailed: Could not send verification email. Try again later.
auth.forgotSub: Enter your email to receive a reset link
auth.forgotSent: Reset link sent — check your inbox
auth.resetSub: Enter and confirm your new password
auth.resetMissingToken: Invalid reset link. Request a new link below.
auth.resetInvalidToken: This reset link is invalid or expired. Request a new one.
auth.resetFail: Could not update password. Try again.

accuracy.subtitle: All predictions are public, including incorrect ones
accuracy.defHold: Hold → accurate if 30-day change is between -5% and +5%
accuracy.dedup1: One prediction per ticker per 30-day window (by analysis date)
accuracy.dedup2: After verification, a new prediction can be recorded

landing.headline: Research any stock in 60 seconds
landing.subheadline: Wenap synthesizes earnings, news, technicals and supply chain data into a structured report — with scenarios, risks, and a clear signal.
landing.fineprint: 5 free analyses/month. No credit card required.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to decide faster
landing.featureFastSub: Multi-source synthesis in one structured report.
landing.featureScenarioSub: Probabilities, price ranges, and trigger conditions.
landing.featureSixSub: Earnings, Growth, Valuation, Momentum, Policy, Sentiment.
landing.featureSupplySub: Key suppliers, customers, and rivals — linked and scored.
landing.featureAccuracySub: Every prediction logged. Verified at expiry. No cherry-picking.
landing.featureLanguagesSub: English, 中文, 日本語, 한국어, Deutsch, 繁體中文.
proFeatures: Action plan + key events + peer view

quotaStrip.achievement: {{count}} pro-grade runs done · Pro unlocks unlimited
quotaStrip.exhaustedLoss: Free quota used up · you lose live tracking on your watchlist

convert.socialProofCritique: {{count}} Pro+ users viewed critic insights on this ticker today
convert.riskFocusLabel: Which risk matters most to you? (optional)
convert.ahaRiskFound: ✓ Flagged 1 risk you may have overlooked
convert.ahaFoot: That’s ~3 hours of work on your own.
convert.quotaLastTwo: 2 runs left · then you lose live tracking on {{ticker}}
convert.quotaLastOne: 1 run left · you won’t track {{ticker}} key events after that
convert.upgradeWeek: {{count}} upgraded to Pro / Pro+ this week
convert.upgradeMissNode: Without Pro you’ll miss key events on {{ticker}}
convert.upgradeLossPro: Without Pro you’re deciding on incomplete information
convert.upgradeCoffee: Less than a coffee · saves an afternoon of research

settings.title: Settings
settings.manageNote: Manage your subscription, change plan, or cancel via Stripe.
settings.stripeNotConfigured: Billing not configured. Email {{email}} to manage your subscription.
settings.portalError: Failed to open billing portal. Please try again.
settings.referralNote: Share your link. Both you and your friend get 30 days Pro after they verify their email (not a replacement for Stripe Pro).
settings.alertsNote: Off by default. Checks watchlist US stocks for prior-session drop % and volume spikes.

sample.banner: This is a public sample report. Sign up to run analyses on any ticker.
sample.notFound: No sample report available for this ticker yet. Check back soon.

compare.title: Compare Tickers
compare.lockedNote: Compare up to 3 tickers with radar overlay — Pro and above.
compare.subPro: Up to 3 symbols · radar overlay · export CSV

tools.title: Pro tools
tools.sub: Structured research beyond a single chat reply.
tools.macroDesc: Global macro figures via World Bank (free, attribution shown).
tools.macroCountryHint: Example: USA, JPN, DEU, MYS. Saved locally and applied to new reports.
tools.alertsDesc: Watchlist drop % / volume spikes (off by default).
tools.usEquityNote: Pro+ depth features (insider, Congress, screener) focus on US equities.

screener.title: AI stock screener
screener.placeholder: e.g. Dividend growers in healthcare with low debt
screener.disclaimer: For research only — not investment advice. Results are AI-generated; verify before acting.
screener.locked: Pro+ required for the AI screener.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.sub: Start free. Upgrade when you need deeper analysis.
pricing.readingTimeHint: 1 minute for the takeaway, 3 minutes for the full picture, 5+ minutes for a deep read.
pricing.vsChatGpt: Unlike a chatbot: locked price + source, six-dimension score, ~2 min structured report.
pricing.proFeature2: Compare up to 3 tickers + radar + CSV
pricing.proFeature3: Technical indicators in reports (EOD) + macro context (qualitative)
pricing.proFeature6: Action line, key events, peer block
pricing.proPlusFeature2: SEC insider filings + House trade disclosures
pricing.proPlusFeature7: Advanced panel folded by default (less clutter)
pricing.stripeNotConfigured: Online payment not available yet. Email {{email}} to upgrade.
pricing.upgradeError: Something went wrong, please try again
pricing.faq1A: Yes. Cancel at any time from your account settings. You keep access until the end of the billing period.
pricing.faq2A: Your account downgrades to Free at the end of the current billing period. Your history and watchlist are preserved.
pricing.faq3A: Payments are processed by Stripe, a PCI-compliant payment provider. We never store your card details.
pricing.legalNote: By upgrading you agree to our Terms of Service. Billing is handled by Stripe; you may cancel renewal in the customer portal.

report.dimScoreUnavailableTip: Insufficient data to score this dimension
report.scenarioOutside: Price is outside scenario ranges; wait for a clearer direction.
report.advancedDisclaimer: Research data only — not buy/sell advice.
report.targetMismatch: Target price may not align with the bull scenario; verify data.
report.sourcesSummaryLoss: {{count}} sources · ~{{hours}}h saved this run · without Pro you may decide on incomplete info
report.upsideLoss: Skip this report → you may miss ~${{amount}} upside
report.scorePercentile: Higher than {{pct}}% of today’s analyzed tickers
report.scoreTierHint: Pro+ uses stricter scoring after bull/bear debate and critic review. A lower score reflects conservative confidence, not a worse stock.
report.rrExplain: Risk/Reward ratio — expected upside vs downside based on target and stop-loss levels
report.signalScoreHint: Score reflects potential; signal reflects current risk/reward timing
report.trustFoot: Not investment advice. Verify prices and filings yourself before acting.
report.accuracyTeaser: 30-day BUY signal win rate {{pct}}% · Full track record
report.critiqueSubPreview: Skeptic preview · Upgrade to Pro+ for full review
report.critiqueSubPro: Main-report skeptic angles (blind spot + 2) · Pro+ adds 3 more AI review items
report.critiquePreviewLock: {{count}} more critic insights · Upgrade to Pro+
report.critiquePreviewLockLoss: {{count}} critic warnings locked · risks others paid to see
report.scenarioProbDisclaimer: Scenario probabilities are model estimates, not market consensus.
report.bullBearUnlockPro: See all bull & bear arguments with Pro
report.supplyUnlockPro: See full supply chain analysis with Pro
report.compareComingSoon: Compare feature coming soon — available in Pro+

pro.eventsTeaser: {{count}} events compiled — upgrade to view full timeline

proPlus.scenarioTeaser: Scenario refinement · trigger price & time window…
proPlus.supplyTeaser: Supply chain thesis · linked ticker analysis…
proPlus.upgradeCtaLoss: Unlock risk warnings you may be missing
proPlus.critiqueSub: Skeptic angles from main report + Pro+ third-pass AI review (up to 6 items)

upgradeBar.unlockLoss: Without Pro you’re deciding on incomplete information
upgradeBar.remainingLoss: {{count}} left · then you lose live tracking
upgradeBar.exhaustedLoss: Quota used · you lose watchlist tracking
